title: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.GitArtifact
description: GitArtifact is the location of a git artifact

branch.description: Branch is the branch to fetch when `SingleBranch` is enabled

depth.description: Depth specifies clones/fetches should be shallow and include the given number of commits from the branch tip

disableSubmodules.description: DisableSubmodules disables submodules during git clone

fetch.description: Fetch specifies a number of refs that should be fetched before checkout

insecureIgnoreHostKey.description: InsecureIgnoreHostKey disables SSH strict host key checking during git clone

insecureSkipTLS.description: InsecureSkipTLS disables server certificate verification resulting in insecure HTTPS connections

passwordSecret.description: PasswordSecret is the secret selector to the repository password

revision.description: Revision is the git commit, tag, branch to checkout

singleBranch.description: SingleBranch enables single branch clone, using the `branch` parameter

sshPrivateKeySecret.description: SSHPrivateKeySecret is the secret selector to the repository ssh private key

usernameSecret.description: UsernameSecret is the secret selector to the repository username
